title: Design a one-way folder sync
prompt:
Outline a one-way folder sync tool (source -> backup) that minimizes copying.
How do you detect changes, handle deletes and renames, and recover from a crash
mid-sync? 6-12 bullets, no code.
rubric: Change detection strategy (mtime+size, content hashes, or a persisted manifest)
Explicit handling of deletions in the target (mirror vs preserve — a stated decision)
Rename/move detection, or a conscious choice to treat them as delete+create
Crash safety: atomic writes, temp-then-rename, or a resumable journal
A comparison plan that avoids re-reading/re-hashing everything on each run
Conflict/edge handling (permissions, symlinks, files changing mid-copy)
